steps.title: Follow the contrast
steps.content: Although Hawaiian literature is heterogeneous, the sentence says scholars connect modern works to traditional Kānaka Maoli stories. The blank should describe thematic linkage across time.

steps.title: Name the ongoing link
steps.content: A and B describe general qualities rather than a thematic connection, and C suggests newness instead of connection to tradition. The word for an ongoing connection best completes the contrast. The answer is D.
